title: AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4558 / 57 OG No. 14, 2463 (April 3, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2915, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (31) on page 148 of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"(31) Cantabaco Elementary School, Naga, Plan No. 4, modified-

Construction of one additional

room...........................P6,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
